auth.registerSuccessCopy: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please click the link in the email to activate your account and start shopping.
auth.emailAlreadyRegisteredResent: This email is already registered. We've sent another verification email. Please check your inbox.
auth.loginUnverifiedResent: This email is registered but not verified yet. We've sent another verification email. Please check your inbox.

errors.nameTooShort: Full name must be at least 2 characters long
errors.nameTooLong: Full name must be at most 100 characters long
errors.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters long and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number
